history.message:
Agent1 Round 1: Anxiolysis refers to the reduction or relief from anxiety without loss of consciousness. This condition typically falls on one end of the spectrum where patients can still respond appropriately to verbal commands but may exhibit some impairment due to mild sedation effects. Therefore, it best aligns with minimal sedation (option C).
Answer: C
